summary: End-to-end validation of iteration 28 (cancel peer slot/session + smart weekly plan with Madinah Mushaf 604 page mapping + landing reorder + peer eval dialog). Backend: 15/15 new tests + 17/17 phase-2 regression all green. DELETE /api/peers/slots/{id} correctly handles creator-200, other-403, missing-404, booked-400. DELETE /api/peers/sessions/{id} handles creator-200, booker-200, missing-404, third-party-403, past-400 ('Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© ШЁШЇШЈШЄ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩЃШ№Щ„'), and deletes both linked slot AND session. POST /api/teacher/weekly-plans/suggest returns 7 fully-populated days (surah, from_ayah, to_ayah, page_range) including the Saturday test-day for Student A & B; missing student returns 400; unknown student returns 404; student token returns 403. Madinah Mushaf page-mapping anchors all exact: Fatihah(1,1)=1, Baqarah(2,1)=2, An'am(6,95)=140, Yaseen(36,1)=440, Naba(78,1)=582, An-Naas(114,1)=604. Frontend: Landing page DOM order confirmed heroв†’home-aboutв†’home-newsв†’home-students-of-weekв†’home-license. Student dashboard home tab renders 4 amber peer-session cards with ШЇШ®Щ€Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш­ШµШ© / Ш§Щ„ШЄЩЃШ§ШµЩЉЩ„ / ШҐЩ„ШєШ§ШЎ (cancel-peer-psess_* present). Peer-review tab renders 1 cancel-slot-* + 4 cancel-session-* buttons (matches seed). Clicking cancel-slot prompts confirm 'ШіЩЉШЄЩ… ШҐЩ„ШєШ§ШЎ Щ‡Ш°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ€Ш№ШЇ. Щ‡Щ„ ШЈЩ†ШЄ Щ…ШЄШЈЩѓШЇШџ', toasts 'ШЄЩ… ШҐЩ„ШєШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ€Ш№ШЇ', and removes the row. All 4 past sessions show 'ШЄЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЄЩ‚ЩЉЩЉЩ…' badge and NO evaluate-btn вЂ” proves myEvaluated UI gate is idempotent.
critical_code_review_comments: cancel_peer_session correctly notifies the other party BEFORE delete and frees the originating slot вЂ” clean transaction order, good.
cancel_peer_session past-time guard uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) and parses Z suffix safely; no timezone naive comparison bug.
suggest_weekly_plan endpoint requires teacher/admin via _require_teacher_or_admin вЂ” verified 403 for student token.

PeerScheduleSection: SlotRow + SessionRow each call onCancel with window.confirm guard and toast on success вЂ” matches PRD UX. Past sessions correctly omit cancel-session-* (gated by scheduled_time<=now).

(Optional polish, non-blocking) The home-tab amber peer-session card's first <Button> showed a slightly truncated 'ШҐЩ„ШєШ§ШЎ' label in some screenshot widths вЂ” the data-testid and click handler are wired correctly; consider min-width or whitespace-nowrap on the cancel-peer-* button for very-narrow flex situations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% вЂ” landing order, home cancel-peer buttons, peer-tab cancel-slot+cancel-session, cancel-slot click+toast+removal, eval-idempotency (no evaluate-btn when ШЄЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЄЩ‚ЩЉЩЉЩ…) all verified.
